ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point in milliseconds */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the market data */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the market data */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the market data */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the market data */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the market data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Highest price a buyer is willing to pay */,
  "ask_price" TEXT /* Lowest price a seller is willing to accept */,
  "last_trade_price" TEXT /* Price of the last trade */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last trade in milliseconds */,
  "open_interest" TEXT /* Total number of outstanding derivative contracts that have not been settled */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES market_data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, option, future, cryptocurrency) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the asset belongs to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's website */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of the feed (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data feed */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feed in milliseconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login in milliseconds */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout configuration of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* Widgets included in the dashboard */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the dashboard in milliseconds */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the dashboard is the default for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price movement, news event) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated in milliseconds */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been read by the user */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "related_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_related_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
